vulnerability.title: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive
vulnerability.description: Check that Chrony only has time sources configured with the server directive.
vulnerability.recommendation: Review and remediate: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive

triage_decision.reason: The finding involves a straightforward configuration edit to Chrony, which is unlikely to cause lockout or immediate system breakage. It aligns with standard STIG hardening practices for time synchronization services, focusing on security by restricting Chrony to client mode only. While time synchronization is critical, the change is a common security measure and can be safely implemented with basic validation.
